posts.title: Research journey begins
posts.body: I am following [this guide](https://irregular-rhomboid.github.io/2025/08/15/hitchhikers-guide-to-research.html) and thus have vibe coded the update to my website to do so. We will try to see if there is any value trying to connect topology or differential geometry to adversarial attacks. I'm trying to link these two as I enjoy both of these topics. I really like pure maths. I prefer proofs to experimental data. Let's see what we can do. I'll be doing short writeups on here after my lit review.
